channel.title: SPL - Green Lake Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Green Lake Branch

item.title: Writing Emotion in Fiction
item.description:
Sunday, March 8, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Green Lake Branch, Meeting Room

Join Karen Finneyfrock to discover writing techniques for infusing your work with emotion.

Event details

item.title: Toddler Play Group
item.description:
Monday, March 9, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Green Lake Branch, Meeting Room

A drop-in play group for toddlers and their families.

Event details

item.title: LEGO Challenge
item.description:
Wednesday, March 11, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Green Lake Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for an afternoon of STEM-related building challenges! 

Event details

item.title: Family Story Time
item.description:
Monday, March 16, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Green Lake Branch

At storytime, kids ages 0-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details
